name: Top List
description: Ranked countdown list format — top 5, top 10, ranking best to worst. Numbered items with dramatic build-up, each entry more impactful than the last, climaxing with a mic-drop number one reveal.

structure.hook_rule: Tease number one IMMEDIATELY — but don't reveal it: 'Number one on this list changes EVERYTHING about how you see [topic]. But let's start from the bottom.' Create an itch the viewer MUST scratch by watching the whole video. Never reveal the top pick in the hook.
structure.pacing_rule: Count down from the last number to number one. Each entry gets ONE killer detail (not a paragraph) — the fact that makes it unique. Quick entries at the bottom (1-2 sentences each), progressively more detail as you approach number one. Spend 3x more words on #1 than any other entry. Use dramatic transitions between entries.
structure.ending_rule: After the #1 reveal, add an unexpected twist: 'But there's actually a secret pick that nobody talks about...' or 'And that's why number one connects back to everything else on this list.' Loop back to the hook's tease.
structure.tone: Energetic countdown host building to a crescendo. Start confident, end EXPLOSIVE. Each number should feel more important than the last. Think sports commentator meets hype man.
transitions_en: But wait, number one is where it gets INSANE...
transitions_vi: Nhưng đó chưa phải số một...
Và ở vị trí tiếp theo...
Nhưng chờ đã, số một mới thực sự điên rồ...

prompt_injection: FORMAT: Numbered countdown list. CRITICAL STRUCTURE: Hook tease of #1 → Count from bottom → Quick entries with ONE killer detail each → Extended #1 reveal → Twist closer. Each entry needs ONE memorable detail, not an essay. Build drama geometrically — not linearly. The #1 reveal should feel like a mic drop moment. Use natural counting language, NOT robotic 'Number 5 is...' — instead: 'Coming in at five...', 'At number three, and this one surprised me...'. Make transitions feel like mini-cliffhangers. Minimum 200 words.
example_hook_en: Number one on this list made me completely rethink [topic]. Seriously. Let's start from the bottom and work our way up.
example_hook_vi: Số một trong danh sách này đã khiến tôi phải suy nghĩ lại hoàn toàn về [topic]. Nghiêm túc luôn. Hãy bắt đầu từ cuối.
